**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Handi Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. provides an excellent forensic-level specimen of the collision between 'business license inflation' and physical reality. The underlying forged Apple Inc. supply chain and multi-million-level production capacity data have been absolutely formatted. Officials classified it in the heavy-metal-flavored 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the demotion strike instantly tore through this disguise: the 2024 insured headcount is only '1 person,' and although the registered capital is as high as 20 million, the actual funds in place (paid-in) are only 135,100 RMB. Even more fatal are the physical coordinates: 'Room 406-17, Building 5, Software Park,' Huqiu District, Suzhou City. In a cubicle within a software park, relying on 130,000 in funds and 1 person to 'manufacture' the 'satellite mobile communication terminals' and 'communication equipment' written on its business license is a violation of basic physical common sense. Looking through the surface, combined with its soft business scopes like 'smart water systems,' 'artificial intelligence software,' and 'rail transit system development,' a definitive diagnosis can be made: this is an extremely asset-light 'one-person micro IT enterprise.' In essence, it is a System Integrator, a software outsourcing shell company, or an SPV for project bidding, primarily reselling IT hardware or undertaking software integration projects for smart city scenarios, entirely lacking any manufacturing genes.
